docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,176.40 FILED BY LEE, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT HU, ALBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO MAR-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
